Dynamic Code Execution Test

'); console.log('\n=== CATEGORY 3: Event Handlers ==='); // Test 10: setAttribute with event handler (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 10] setAttribute onclick'); const button1 = document.createElement('button'); button1.setAttribute('onclick', 'console.log("✓ setAttribute onclick executed")'); button1.textContent = 'Click me (setAttribute)'; document.body.appendChild(button1); button1.click(); // Trigger immediately // Test 11: Direct event handler property (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 11] element.onclick property'); const button2 = document.createElement('button'); button2.onclick = function() { console.log('✓ onclick property executed'); }; button2.textContent = 'Click me (property)'; document.body.appendChild(button2); button2.click(); // Trigger immediately // Test 12: Event handler with Function constructor (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 12] onclick with Function constructor'); const button3 = document.createElement('button'); button3.onclick = new Function('console.log("✓ onclick Function constructor executed")'); button3.textContent = 'Click me (Function)'; document.body.appendChild(button3); button3.click(); // Trigger immediately console.log('\n=== CATEGORY 4: URL-Based Execution ==='); // Test 13: javascript: URL in anchor (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 13] javascript: URL in anchor.href'); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = 'javascript:console.log("✓ javascript: URL executed")'; link.textContent = 'Click me (javascript:)'; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); // Trigger immediately // Test 14: data: URL in script.src (NOT FULLY ANALYZED) console.log('[TEST 14] data: URL in script.src'); const script2 = document.createElement('script'); script2.src = 'data:text/javascript,console.log("✓ data: URL script executed")'; document.body.appendChild(script2); // Test 15: data: URL with base64 (NOT DECODED) console.log('[TEST 15] data: URL with base64'); const script3 = document.createElement('script'); // Base64 of: console.log("✓ base64 data: URL executed") script3.src = 'data:text/javascript;base64,Y29uc29sZS5sb2coIsKcIGJhc2U2NCBkYXRhOiBVUkwgZXhlY3V0ZWQiKQ=='; document.body.appendChild(script3); console.log('\n=== CATEGORY 5: Blob URLs ==='); // Test 16: Blob URL in script (NOT TRACKED) console.log('[TEST 16] Blob URL in script.src'); const code = 'console.log("✓ Blob URL script executed")'; const blob = new Blob([code], {type: 'text/javascript'}); const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const script4 = document.createElement('script'); script4.src = blobUrl; document.body.appendChild(script4); console.log('\n=== CATEGORY 6: Workers (NOT INSTRUMENTED) ==='); // Test 17: Web Worker with Blob URL (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 17] Web Worker with Blob URL'); try { const workerCode = 'self.postMessage("✓ Worker executed")'; const workerBlob = new Blob([workerCode], {type: 'text/javascript'}); const workerUrl = URL.createObjectURL(workerBlob); const worker = new Worker(workerUrl); worker.onmessage = (e) => console.log(e.data); } catch(e) { console.log('Worker test skipped (not supported or blocked)'); } console.log('\n=== CATEGORY 7: Advanced Methods ==='); // Test 18: Reflect.construct with Function (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 18] Reflect.construct(Function)'); const fn = Reflect.construct(Function, ['console.log("✓ Reflect.construct executed")']); fn(); // Test 19: Aliased eval (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 19] Aliased eval'); const e = eval; e('console.log("✓ Aliased eval executed")'); // Test 20: Computed property eval (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 20] Computed property eval'); window['eval']('console.log("✓ Computed property eval executed")'); console.log('\n=== CATEGORY 8: iframe-based ==='); // Test 21: iframe srcdoc (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 21] iframe srcdoc'); const iframe1 = document.createElement('iframe'); iframe1.srcdoc = ''; iframe1.style.display = 'none'; document.body.appendChild(iframe1); // Test 22: iframe contentWindow.eval (NOT INSTRUMENTED) console.log('[TEST 22] iframe contentWindow.eval'); setTimeout(() => { const iframe2 = document.createElement('iframe'); iframe2.style.display = 'none'; document.body.appendChild(iframe2); setTimeout(() => { try { iframe2.contentWindow.eval('parent.console.log("✓ iframe.contentWindow.eval executed")'); } catch(e) { console.log('iframe contentWindow.eval blocked (CSP or cross-origin)'); } }, 100); }, 500); console.log('\n=== TEST COMPLETE ==='); console.log('Check JSONL output to see which execution methods were captured');
